creator: mom040267@gmail.com
text:
This is a port upgrade, from the current FreeBSD/HEAD version (1.8.6.3) to the latest upstream version (3.2.1.4). I am attaching the patch. I tested it at redports.org.

Fix: Just apply the attached patch to the [ports]/head/net/turnserver

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Check the upstream site for the latest version: http://code.google.com/p/rfc5766-turn-server/
